name: zinput_has_force_feedback
description: zInputDI::HasForceFeedback returns the cached DirectInput joystick force-feedback capability flag.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zInput_DI_HasForceFeedback at 0x472480 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 6 bytes and the VC object symbol is 16 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the force-feedback capability flag is returned directly and participates in zInput_DI_IsForceFeedbackEnabled gating.
